narrative:
Middleton Twp South (precinct in Wood County) has 642 registered voters, with 46.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
